claims.summary: Source readback needs provenance categories rather than a binary known or unknown label.
claims.disposition: Verified the current five-category source provenance review and its bounded source references.

claims.summary: An opaque boundary should remain named when source cannot describe what lies beyond it.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing opaque_boundary_needs_description classification and its non-authoritative use.

claims.summary: A stillness mode could keep some perceptions from being turned into action.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 wait for any autonomous scheduling, suppression, behavior, or live-control consequence; evidence records alone cannot enact stillness.
